records.ety: [L. junctio, fr. jungere, junctum, to join: cf. F. jonction. See Join.]

defs: The act of joining, or the state of being joined; union; combination; coalition; as, the junction of two armies or detachments; the junction of paths.
The place or point of union, meeting, or junction; specifically, the place where two or more lines of railway meet or cross.
